carlos.last_update:

Pushed Out deals are deals that the expected time to close has passed the expected time to close and jumped to another Quarter (Last Quarter > Current Quarter). Story wise we need to show some type of specific behavior for these deals to have the same type of warnings (single threaded can be a type of warning)
(1/26) - This forecas category is created automatically by the platform, we don't need to add this manually or via automation, the work beeing done is to move some of the deals that are closing in the last quartert to the current quarter
